title: elaphoglossum pumilio
intro: Elaphoglossum pumilio is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Dryopteridaceae, native to tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects, which have been utilized in traditional medicine to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Elaphoglossum pumilio include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and protect against infections. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, although more research is needed to fully understand its efficacy and potential side effects.
